title: Nuptial rights: The rights a spouse has over his or her partner, or the duties of the spouse

evidence.raw_text:
Rights that each spouse can expect from the other, particularly sexual rights but 
also the rights to society, comfort, and affection .
evidence.clean_text: Whereas, حقوق زوجية means “Nuptial rights: The rights a spouse has over his or her partner, or the duties of the spouse (Saleh, 2011, p.85).
